name: io.github.xiaojiou176-open/switchyard-mcp
title: Switchyard MCP
description: Read-only MCP surface for Switchyard runtime truth, BYOK/Web-Login catalogs, and safe diagnostics.

environmentVariables.name: SWITCHYARD_RUNTIME_BASE_URL
environmentVariables.description: Base URL for the Switchyard service runtime. Defaults to http://127.0.0.1:4010 when omitted.
